case_title: COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC. VS. RUSTY DEFOE

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC. SERVED MAR-30-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 FONT BLVD. #M-E, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132-2525, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $405.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (CCP 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLEGIATE HOUSING SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEFOE, RUSTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON APRIL 28, 2010, $969.00 RENT, $405.00 COSTS, $904.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,278.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
